hero.headline: Low-carbon transition, concrete and measurable
hero.subheadline: SAEN26 supports businesses in their decarbonization strategy: carbon footprint assessment, action plans, and ESG reporting.

whyUs.title: Why SAEN26?
whyUs.intro: We combine technical expertise and strategic vision to help you concretely reduce your carbon footprint.

expertise.title: Certified expertise
expertise.description: Our consultants master recognized frameworks (GHG Protocol, ISO 14064) and current regulatory requirements.

pragmatic.title: Pragmatic approach
pragmatic.description: Every mission starts from your real constraints. We build actionable plans, not reports that gather dust.

longterm.title: Long-term commitment
longterm.description: We stay by your side over time: indicator monitoring, annual adjustments, and support with regulatory reporting.

services.title: Our services
services.intro: Turnkey solutions to manage your ecological transition from start to finish.

bilan.title: Carbon footprint
bilan.description: Precise measurement of your GHG emissions (scopes 1, 2 and 3) according to the GHG Protocol, for a reliable decision-making base.

strategy.title: Low-carbon strategy
strategy.description: Setting targets aligned with the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi) and building your decarbonization roadmap.

training.title: Training & awareness
training.description: Tailored workshops for your teams: understanding climate issues, mastering tools, and engaging the entire organization.

reporting.title: ESG reporting
reporting.description: Building your non-financial reporting compliant with CSRD/ESRS requirements, ready for investors and stakeholders.

longTerm.title: Support over the long term
longTerm.description: Ecological transition is not a one-off project — it is a profound transformation. SAEN26 supports you at every stage, from the initial assessment to multi-year monitoring of your objectives.
bullets: Quarterly monitoring of your carbon indicators
Annual update of your GHG inventory
Direct interface with your auditors and statutory auditors

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: SAEN26 is a consulting firm specializing in the ecological transition of businesses. Our conviction: every organization, regardless of size, can act effectively on its environmental footprint. We put our expertise at the service of this ambition, with rigor, transparency, and commitment.

hero.title: About SAEN26
hero.subtitle: A consulting firm committed to a low-carbon economy, serving companies that want to take concrete action.

story.title: Our story
story.body: Founded by experts in environment and business strategy, SAEN26 was born from the conviction that ecological transition must be an opportunity for competitiveness, not a burden. Since our creation, we have supported dozens of companies in their transformation towards a more sustainable model.

items.title: Scientific rigor
items.description: We base every recommendation on verifiable data and recognized methodologies.

items.title: Full transparency
items.description: Our deliverables are clear, documented, and understandable at all levels of your organization.

items.title: Measurable impact
items.description: We define concrete indicators so you can track and prove your progress.

cta.label: Get in touch
cta.description: Let's talk about your decarbonization project.

hero.title: Contact us
hero.subtitle: Do you have a decarbonization project? A question about our services? We respond within 48 hours.

form.name: Full name
form.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We will get back to you within 48 hours.
form.error: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us directly by email.

footer.tagline: Consulting firm specialized in ecological transition and low-carbon strategy.
